obligation.goal:
eq (replace_constant_in_frm c (Var_trm z) (subst_frm s p))
  (subst_frm (compose (replace_constant_in_trm c (Var_trm z)) s)
     (replace_constant_in_frm c (Var_trm z) p))

nodes.proof: apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst. intros x H. apply in_accum_hatom_in_trm_iff_is_free_in_trm in H. simpl in H. destruct H as [H|H]; [injection H as <- | contradiction H]. rewrite FRESH. simpl. reflexivity.
attempts: apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst. intros x H. simpl in H. apply beq_nat_true in H. subst x. rewrite FRESH. simpl. auto.

apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst. intros x Hfree. assert (Hmem : L.In (inl x) (accum_hatom_in_trm (Var_trm z))) by
  (apply (proj1 (in_accum_hatom_in_trm_iff_is_free_in_trm x (Var_trm z))); exact Hfree). simpl in Hmem. destruct Hmem as [H | H]; [injection H as -> | contradiction]. rewrite FRESH. simpl. reflexivity.
unfold replace_constant_in_frm, replace_constant_in_trm. apply hsubst_frm_subst_frm. exact FRESH.

apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst.
intros x H.
apply in_accum_hatom_in_trm_iff_is_free_in_trm in H.
simpl in H.
destruct H as [H|H]; [injection H as <- | contradiction H].
rewrite FRESH.
simpl.
reflexivity.
failed_attempts: apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst. intros x H. simpl in H. apply beq_nat_true in H. subst x. rewrite FRESH. simpl. auto.

apply replace_constant_in_frm_compat_subst. intros x Hfree. assert (Hmem : L.In (inl x) (accum_hatom_in_trm (Var_trm z))) by
  (apply (proj1 (in_accum_hatom_in_trm_iff_is_free_in_trm x (Var_trm z))); exact Hfree). simpl in Hmem. destruct Hmem as [H | H]; [injection H as -> | contradiction]. rewrite FRESH. simpl. reflexivity.
unfold replace_constant_in_frm, replace_constant_in_trm. apply hsubst_frm_subst_frm. exact FRESH.
